w4ab1c23c15c15c18c19.CfnAbout:
Use the `AWS::CloudFormation::Authentication` resource to specify authentication credentials for files or sources that you specify with the [`AWS::CloudFormation::Init`](aws-resource-init.md) resource.

To include authentication information for a file or source that you specify with `AWS::CloudFormation::Init`, use the `uris` property if the source is a URI or the `buckets` property if the source is an Amazon S3 bucket. For more information about files, see [Files](aws-resource-init.md

w4ab1c23c15c15c18c19.accessKeyId.Description: Specifies the access key ID for S3 authentication.
w4ab1c23c15c15c18c19.accessKeyId.Required: Conditional\. Can be specified only if the `type` property is set to `"S3"`\.

w4ab1c23c15c15c18c19.buckets.Description: A comma-delimited list of Amazon S3 buckets to be associated with the S3 authentication credentials.
w4ab1c23c15c15c18c19.buckets.Required: Conditional\. Can be specified only if the `type` property is set to `"S3"`\.

w4ab1c23c15c15c18c19.password.Description: Specifies the password for basic authentication.
w4ab1c23c15c15c18c19.password.Required: Conditional\. Can be specified only if the type property is set to `"basic"`\.

w4ab1c23c15c15c18c19.secretKey.Description: Specifies the secret key for S3 authentication.
w4ab1c23c15c15c18c19.secretKey.Required: Conditional\. Can be specified only if the `type` property is set to `"S3"`\.

w4ab1c23c15c15c18c19.type.Description: Specifies whether the authentication scheme uses a user name and password ("basic") or an access key ID and secret key ("S3").  If you specify `"basic"`, specify the `username`, `password`, and `uris` properties.  If you specify `"S3"`, specify the `accessKeyId`, `secretKey`, and `buckets` (optional) properties.

w4ab1c23c15c15c18c19.uris.Description: A comma-delimited list of URIs to be associated with the basic authentication credentials. The authorization applies to the specified URIs and any more specific URI. For example, if you specify `http://www.example.com`, the authorization will also apply to `http://www.example.com/test`.
w4ab1c23c15c15c18c19.uris.Required: Conditional\. Can be specified only if the `type` property is set to `"basic"`\.

w4ab1c23c15c15c18c19.username.Description: Specifies the user name for basic authentication.
w4ab1c23c15c15c18c19.username.Required: Conditional\. Can be specified only if the type property is set to `"basic"`\.

w4ab1c23c15c15c18c19.roleName.Description: Describes the role for role-based authentication.  This role must be contained within the instance profile that's attached to the EC2 instance. An instance profile can only contain one IAM role.
w4ab1c23c15c15c18c19.roleName.Required: Conditional\. Can be specified only if the `type` property is set to `"S3"`\.
